info.title: Baseten inference API
info.description:
API for invoking models and chains deployed on Baseten. Model endpoints use the `model-{model_id}` subdomain; chain endpoints use the `chain-{chain_id}` subdomain. All other path and query semantics are identical across both.

For regional environments, the environment name is embedded in the hostname (e.g. `model-{model_id}-{env_name}.api.baseten.co`) and the path is bare (e.g. `/predict` instead of `/environments/{env_name}/predict`). See the "Regional" tagged endpoints. Path-based routes (`/production/*`, `/development/*`, `/environments/*`, `/deployment/*`) are not available on regional hostnames.

model_id.description: The model's alphanumeric ID, found in your model dashboard.

chain_id.description: The chain's alphanumeric ID, found in your chain dashboard.

post.summary: Call the production environment of a model.
post.description: Sends a synchronous predict request to the deployment promoted to the production environment. The request body is forwarded directly to the model's `predict` function.

post.summary: Call the development deployment of a model.
post.description: Sends a synchronous predict request to the development deployment.

post.summary: Call the model deployment associated with a specified environment.
post.description: Sends a synchronous predict request to the deployment promoted to the specified environment.

post.summary: Call a specific deployment of a model by deployment ID.
post.description: Sends a synchronous predict request to the specified deployment.

post.summary: Call the production environment of a chain.
post.description: Sends a synchronous request to the chain deployment promoted to the production environment. The request body is forwarded to the chain's `run_remote` entrypoint.

post.summary: Call the development deployment of a chain.
Call the chain deployment associated with a specified environment.
Call a specific chain deployment by deployment ID.
Asynchronously call the production environment of a model.
post.description: Enqueues an asynchronous predict request for the deployment promoted to the production environment. Returns a request ID that can be used to poll for status or cancel the request.

post.summary: Asynchronously call the development deployment of a model.
Asynchronously call a named environment of a model.
Asynchronously call a specific deployment of a model.
Asynchronously call the production environment of a chain.
post.description: Enqueues an asynchronous request for the chain deployment promoted to the production environment.

post.summary: Asynchronously call the development deployment of a chain.
Asynchronously call a named environment of a chain.
Asynchronously call a specific deployment of a chain.

get.summary: Get the status of an async request.
get.description: Returns the current status of an async model or chain request. Rate limited to 20 requests per second.

delete.description: Cancels an async request. Only requests with `QUEUED` status may be canceled. Rate limited to 20 requests per second.

get.summary: Get async queue status for the production environment.
get.description: Returns the number of queued and in-progress async requests for the deployment promoted to the production environment. Rate limited to 20 requests per second.

get.summary: Get async queue status for the development deployment.
Get async queue status for a named environment.
Get async queue status for a specific deployment.

post.summary: Wake the production environment of a model.
post.description: Triggers a wake for the deployment promoted to the production environment. Returns immediately with 202 Accepted.

post.summary: Wake the development deployment of a model.
Wake a named environment of a model.
Wake a specific deployment of a model by deployment ID.
Call a regional environment of a model.
post.description: Sends a synchronous predict request via a regional hostname. The environment is determined by the hostname, not the path.

post.summary: Call a regional environment of a chain.
post.description: Sends a synchronous run_remote request via a regional hostname. The environment is determined by the hostname, not the path.

post.summary: Asynchronously call a regional environment of a model.
post.description: Enqueues an asynchronous predict request via a regional hostname. The environment is determined by the hostname, not the path.

post.summary: Asynchronously call a regional environment of a chain.
post.description: Enqueues an asynchronous run_remote request via a regional hostname. The environment is determined by the hostname, not the path.

get.summary: Get async queue status for a regional environment.

post.summary: Wake a regional environment of a model.

BearerAuth.description: Send `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>`. The legacy `Authorization: Api-Key <api_key>` scheme is also accepted.

deployment_id.name: deployment_id
deployment_id.description: The alphanumeric ID of the deployment.

request_id.name: request_id
request_id.description: The ID of the async request.

schema.description: JSON-serializable model input. The shape is defined by the model's `predict` function.
JSON input matching the chain's `run_remote` method signature.

AsyncPredictInput.description: There is a 256 KiB size limit on async predict request payloads.

schema.description: JSON input matching the chain's `run_remote` method signature.
JSON-serializable output. The shape is defined by the model.
Binary or streaming output. Streaming responses use `transfer-encoding: chunked`.
JSON-serializable output. The shape is defined by the chain.

request_id.description: The ID of the async request.
The ID of the async request.

GetAsyncRequestStatusOutput.description: Current status of an async request.

CancelAsyncRequestOutput.description: Result of an async request cancellation.

request_id.description: The ID of the async request.

message.description: Additional details about whether the request was canceled.

GetAsyncQueueStatusOutput.description: Async queue status for a deployment.

num_queued_requests.description: Number of requests with QUEUED status awaiting processing.

num_in_progress_requests.description: Number of requests currently being processed by the model.

webhook_endpoint.description: HTTPS URL to receive the prediction result via webhook. Both HTTP/2 and HTTP/1.1 are supported. If omitted, the model must save outputs so they can be accessed later.

priority.description: Priority of the request. Lower values are higher priority.

max_time_in_queue_seconds.description: Maximum time in seconds a request will spend in the queue before expiring. Must be between 10 seconds and 72 hours.

InferenceRetryConfig.description: Exponential backoff parameters for retrying predict requests.

initial_delay_ms.description: Minimum time between retries in milliseconds.

max_delay_ms.description: Maximum time between retries in milliseconds.

request_id.description: The ID of the async request.

model_id.description: The ID of the model that executed the request. Present for model requests.

chain_id.description: The ID of the chain that executed the request. Present for chain requests.

deployment_id.description: The ID of the deployment that executed the request.

status.description: The status of the async request.

webhook_status.description: The status of sending the prediction result to the provided webhook.

created_at.description: The time in UTC at which the async request was created.

status_at.description: The time in UTC at which the async request's status was last updated.

errors.description: Errors that occurred while processing the async request. Empty if no errors occurred.

code.description: The type of error that occurred.

tags.name: Non-Regional
tags.description: Endpoints that use path-based routing (e.g. `/production/predict`, `/environments/{env_name}/predict`). Only available on standard hostnames (`model-{model_id}.api.baseten.co`), not regional hostnames.

tags.name: Regional
tags.description: Endpoints that use bare paths (e.g. `/predict`, `/wake`). Only available on regional hostnames (`model-{model_id}-{env_name}.api.baseten.co`), where the environment is determined by the hostname.
